# AKM Portfolio - Comprehensive Context

## Personal Identity
**Name:** Anjani Kumar Mishra (AKM)
**Role:** Finance Analyst, FP&A Enthusiast & Fintech Developer
**Location:** Hyderabad, India
**Age:** 20 (Born ~2006)
**Pronouns:** He/Him
**Objective:** Seeking entry-level roles or internships in FP&A (Financial Planning & Analysis) or Finance Operations.
**Contact:** inakm@proton.me
**Websites/Links:**
- Portfolio: https://inakm.github.io
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/inakmm
- Twitter/X: https://x.com/in_akm
- GitHub: https://github.com/inakm
- Discord: @in_akm

## Educational Background
**1. Association of Chartered Certified Accountants (ACCA)**
- Status: Ongoing (Trainee)
- Progress: Applied Knowledge completed; Applied Skills (8 out of 13 papers cleared).

**2. Bachelor of Commerce (Hons)**
- Institution: Gandhi Institute of Technology and Management (GITAM) University (2023 - 2026)
- Focus: IFRS, financial analysis, auditing, and global accounting standards.

**3. Intermediate (CBSE) Commerce**
- Institution: Creane Memorial High School (2021 - 2023)
- Subjects: Accountancy, Business Studies, Economics.

## Professional Experience
**Mindsparc Innovations Pvt. Ltd.**
- Role: Finance & Operations Intern
- Timeline: May 2025 - July 2025
- Responsibilities:
  - Transaction-level data validation for consistency across recurring finance operations.
  - Generating Excel-based financial summaries for management review and variance checks.
  - Auditing datasets for logical consistency before reporting cycles.
  - Maintaining finance documentation for audit readiness.

**F9XR Team**
- Role: Founding Member
- Timeline: 2024 - Present
- Description: AI-Powered Web Design & Local SEO Growth Agency building tailored architectures for Salons, Clinics, and Global Brands.

## Hard Skills & Technical Expertise
- **Core Finance:** Financial Analysis, Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) Modeling, MS Excel, Power Query, Accounting, IFRS Standards, Variance Checks, Audit Readiness, Risk Management, Ratio Analysis.
- **Fintech & Data:** Bloomberg Query Language (BQL) in Excel, Crypto Development, Decentralized Finance (DeFi) mechanics.
- **Tools & Platforms:** Bloomberg Terminal, Generative AI (Prompt Engineering), NotebookLM, DeepSeek, Claude, Workiva, Alteryx, ChatGPT.
- **Software/Coding:** Frontend web development (HTML/CSS/Tailwind JS/React), API integrations, Local SEO optimization.

## Soft Skills & Philosophy
- **Key Traits:** Self-Motivation, Adaptability, Patience, Analytical Thinking.
- **Interests:** Stock Market, Blogging, Travel, Cultures.
- **Philosophy:** AKM aims to bridge traditional corporate finance frameworks with modern decentralized technology. He focuses on taking complicated financial data and transforming it into clear, actionable strategies that drive business growth. 

## Detailed Project Portfolio (Selected Works)
**1. GatiGo**
- Category: Finance / Startup
- Description: A 3-year Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) model integrating sensitivity analysis. AKM designed cost structures, pricing assumptions, and expense tracking. Documented end-to-end payment workflows and approval pipelines.
- URL: https://inakm.github.io/page/projects/gatigo.html

**2. Rail Vikas Nigam Ltd (RVNL) Analysis**
- Category: Equity Research
- Description: Comprehensive equity research and financial modeling of RVNL's business operations. Deep dive into annual reports and performance metrics.
- URL: https://inakm.github.io/page/projects/rvnl.html

**3. iCryptos Dash**
- Category: Web3 / Fintech
- Description: Dashboard for tracking crypto earnings, airdrops, and investments globally. Real-time data visualization of asset portfolios.

**4. FoilAI**
- Category: AI / Tech
- Description: Front-end engineering for a generative AI image platform tailored toward artists, focusing entirely on an intuitive UI/UX.

**5. BQL Analysis Hub**
- Category: Finance / Data
- Description: Compilation of Bloomberg Query Language (BQL) projects that showcase advanced financial data retrieval and dynamic manipulation natively in MS Excel.

## Credentials & Certifications
- Bloomberg Finance Fundamentals (BFF) - Ongoing
- Bloomberg Environmental Social Governance - Ongoing

- Bloomberg Market Concepts (BMC) (Mar 2026)
- Bloomberg Spreadsheet Analysis (BQL) Certificate (Mar 2026)

## Writing & Academia
- Published multiple internal academic case studies on platforms like Scribd and SlideShare (e.g. SBI Governance Report, Adani Power Performance Management, Business Takeovers, Goods & Services Tax, Advocacy Threats).
- Has dynamic blogs connected via Blogger API for "Crypto Radar News" and "TONTUF Money".

## SEO & Accessibility Configurations
This profile architecture uses strict semantic HTML, OpenSearch descriptors, robots.txt routing, and is heavily optimized for LLM crawlers via this text endpoint.
